source.purpose: A real evidentiary clue anchored to an investigation thread should still be created and retrievable.

input.playerInput: Check the query logs for Mareth's audit.

narrator.prose: The archive log shows Auditor Mareth stopped filing tithe reports four days ago, then opened a classified family-registry query under Elan Vos's name.

payload.title: Mareth's true audit purpose
payload.resolution_criteria: Establish why Mareth stopped filing reports and what the classified family-registry query targets.
payload.failure_mode: Mareth's parallel investigation reaches leverage before the PC can prove it.
payload.retrieval_cue: Mareth stopped filing reports and opened a classified family-registry query.

payload.content: Mareth stopped filing tithe reports four days ago and opened a classified family-registry query under Elan Vos's name.
payload.evidence_question: Why did Mareth stop filing reports, and what is his classified family-registry query targeting?
payload.retrieval_cue: Archive query log linking Mareth's silence to Elan Vos's family registry.
